title: Fun & Essential Foods
description: a fun mod about cooking by lump_of_coal
body:
Hi! i am lump_of_coal, this is a project i have wanted to make for a while! this is a experimental mod for me, so all i have is marshmallow cooking :(, I hope you enjoy it though! I hope to make this a big massive mod for food and cooking and you can help me with that by making a big community out of this mod :) that would be a MASSIVE HELP!!! thank you for your time :)

![cooking marshmallows :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734601c51d437bdf87f40afac58bec48e322c9e8.png)![holding stick :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9e5db23abce9cdcfa93db28bbe4643d93222024.png)![cookbook pics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b913143cc4a40ac3b2ac42a78b88b573e8181eae.png)

(Feel free to use this in a modpack! just let me know so i can see it)

leave feedback please! i rely on player feedback ( + my own ideas) to make my creations better! thank you!

I hope to upgrade to fabric for my own needs

you can make a cook book with a 3x3 crafting grid leather on top and bottom middle paper all through the middle (like a book crafting recipe) and 2 string in the 2 spaces on the left <3 
- lump_of_coal
